```{r}
                   )
)

```



```{r fig.height=4, fig.width=12}
for (nct in n_ct_to_select) {
  res_all <- results_zeroimp_OnlyHighAbundantCts[results_zeroimp_OnlyHighAbundantCts$n_celltypes == nct, ]
  res_avg <- res_all %>%
    group_by(zero_imp_method, Amount_of_perturbation) %>%
    mutate(sil_sem = sd(Silhouette_score) / sqrt(length(Silhouette_score)), Silhouette_score = mean(Silhouette_score),
           mod_sem = sd(Modularity_score) / sqrt(length(Modularity_score)), Modularity_score = mean(Modularity_score),
           ari_sem = sd(Adjusted_Rand_Index) / sqrt(length(Adjusted_Rand_Index)), Adjusted_Rand_Index = mean(Adjusted_Rand_Index)) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    distinct(interaction(zero_imp_method, Amount_of_perturbation), .keep_all=TRUE)
  
  zim <- res_avg$zero_imp_method
  zim[grepl("multRepl|percentage", zim)] <- paste0(zim[grepl("multRepl|percentage", zim)], "%")
  res_avg$zero_imp_method <- zim
  
  p_list <- list()
  p_list[["p_sil"]] <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Silhouette_score, color = zero_imp_method)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Silhouette_score-sil_sem, ymax=Silhouette_score+sil_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Silhouette_score), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Silhouette_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differential cell types: ", nct, "\n(CLR-transformation)"))
  p_list[["p_mod"]] <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Modularity_score, color = zero_imp_method)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Modularity_score-mod_sem, ymax=Modularity_score+mod_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Modularity_score), 0.5)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differential cell types: ", nct, "\n(CLR-transformation)"))
  p_list[["p_clust"]] <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Adjusted_Rand_Index, color = zero_imp_method)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Adjusted_Rand_Index-ari_sem, ymax=Adjusted_Rand_Index+ari_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Adjusted_Rand_Index), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differential cell types: ", nct, "\n(CLR-transformation)"))
  p_list[["p_anosim"]] <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = ANOSIM_score, color = zero_imp_method)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=ANOSIM_score-ari_sem, ymax=ANOSIM_score+ari_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$ANOSIM_score), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differential cell types: ", nct, "\n(CLR-transformation)"))
  
  ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, paste0("zero_imputation_semisynthetic_highly_abu", nct, "celltypesda.pdf")), plot = p_list[["p_clust"]], width = 4, height = 4)
  
  if (nct == 10) {
    ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, "zero_imputation_semisynthetic_highly_abu.pdf"), plot = p_list[["p_clust"]] + ggtitle("10 high abundant cell types"), width = 5, height = 4)
  }
  
  p <- ggarrange(plotlist = p_list, nrow=1, common.legend = TRUE)
  print(p)
}

```



## L3 annotations lower number of cells

```{r}
# Subset to CMV negative BR1 female samples
cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples <- (dproc$meta$subject.cmv == "Negative") & (dproc$meta$cohort.cohortGuid == "BR1") & (dproc$meta$subject.biologicalSex == "Female")

df_counts <- dproc[["L3"]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples,]

colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\-", "minus")
colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\+", "plus")

# To one or multiple cell types, add +1%, +5%, +10%, +20%, +50%
Amount_of_perturbation <- c(1.5, 1.75, 2, 3, 4, 6)
n_ct_to_select <- c(5, 10)

df_counts <- round(df_counts / 10)

results_zeroimp_LowCellCounts <- datrans(count_mat = df_counts, Amount_of_perturbation = Amount_of_perturbation, n_ct_to_select = n_ct_to_select,
                   trans_method = "clr_pca",
                   zero_imp_method = c(
                      "counts_zeros__1",
                      "counts_all__1",
                      "percentage_all__0.001",
                      "percentage_all__0.01",
                      "percentage_all__0.1",
                      "percentage_all__1",
                      "multLN",
                      "multRepl__0.01",
                      "multRepl__0.1",
                      "multRepl__1"
                   )
)

```

```{r fig.height=4, fig.width=12}
for (nct in n_ct_to_select) {
  res_all <- results_zeroimp_LowCellCounts[results_zeroimp_LowCellCounts$n_celltypes == nct, ]
  res_avg <- res_all %>%
    group_by(zero_imp_method, Amount_of_perturbation) %>%
    mutate(sil_sem = sd(Silhouette_score) / sqrt(length(Silhouette_score)), Silhouette_score = mean(Silhouette_score),
           mod_sem = sd(Modularity_score) / sqrt(length(Modularity_score)), Modularity_score = mean(Modularity_score),
           ari_sem = sd(Adjusted_Rand_Index) / sqrt(length(Adjusted_Rand_Index)), Adjusted_Rand_Index = mean(Adjusted_Rand_Index)) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    distinct(interaction(zero_imp_method, Amount_of_perturbation), .keep_all=TRUE)
  
  zim <- res_avg$zero_imp_method
  zim[grepl("multRepl|percentage", zim)] <- paste0(zim[grepl("multRepl|percentage", zim)], "%")
  res_avg$zero_imp_method <- zim
  
  p_list <- list()
  p_list[["p_sil"]] <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Silhouette_score, color = zero_imp_method)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Silhouette_score-sil_sem, ymax=Silhouette_score+sil_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Silhouette_score), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Silhouette_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differential cell types: ", nct, "\n(CLR-transformation)"))
  p_list[["p_mod"]] <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Modularity_score, color = zero_imp_method)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Modularity_score-mod_sem, ymax=Modularity_score+mod_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Modularity_score), 0.5)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differential cell types: ", nct, "\n(CLR-transformation)"))
  p_list[["p_clust"]] <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Adjusted_Rand_Index, color = zero_imp_method)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Adjusted_Rand_Index-ari_sem, ymax=Adjusted_Rand_Index+ari_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Adjusted_Rand_Index), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differential cell types: ", nct, "\n(CLR-transformation)"))
  p_list[["p_anosim"]] <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = ANOSIM_score, color = zero_imp_method)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=ANOSIM_score-ari_sem, ymax=ANOSIM_score+ari_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$ANOSIM_score), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differential cell types: ", nct, "\n(CLR-transformation)"))
  
  ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, paste0("zero_imputation_semisynthetic_lowcells", nct, "celltypesda.pdf")), plot = p_list[["p_clust"]], width = 4, height = 4)
  
  if (nct == 10) {
    ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, "zero_imputation_semisynthetic_lowcells.pdf"), plot = p_list[["p_clust"]] + ggtitle("10 random cell types\nAll counts / 10"), width = 5, height = 4)
  }
  
  p <- ggarrange(plotlist = p_list, nrow=1, common.legend = TRUE)
  print(p)
}

```



## L3 annotations unbalanced counts

```{r}
# Subset to CMV negative BR1 female samples
cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples <- (dproc$meta$subject.cmv == "Negative") & (dproc$meta$cohort.cohortGuid == "BR1") & (dproc$meta$subject.biologicalSex == "Female")

df_counts <- dproc[["L3"]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples,]

colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\-", "minus")
colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\+", "plus")

# To one or multiple cell types, add +1%, +5%, +10%, +20%, +50%
Amount_of_perturbation <- c(1.5, 1.75, 2, 3, 4, 6)
n_ct_to_select <- c(5, 10)

# Generate random numbers between -1 and 1 for each row
random_numbers <- runif(nrow(df_counts), min = -1, max = 1)

# Exponentiate 10 with each random number
multiplier <- 10^random_numbers

# Multiply each row by the corresponding multiplier
df_counts <- sweep(df_counts, 1, multiplier, `*`)

df_counts <- round(df_counts)

results_zeroimp_UnbalancedCounts <- datrans(count_mat = df_counts, Amount_of_perturbation = Amount_of_perturbation, n_ct_to_select = n_ct_to_select,
                   trans_method = "clr_pca",
                   zero_imp_method = c(
                      "counts_zeros__1",
                      "counts_all__1",
                      "percentage_all__0.001",
                      "percentage_all__0.01",
                      "percentage_all__0.1",
                      "percentage_all__1",
                      "multLN",
                      "multRepl__0.01",
                      "multRepl__0.1",
                      "multRepl__1"
                   )
)

```

```{r fig.height=4, fig.width=12}
for (nct in n_ct_to_select) {
  res_all <- results_zeroimp_UnbalancedCounts[results_zeroimp_UnbalancedCounts$n_celltypes == nct, ]
  res_avg <- res_all %>%
    group_by(zero_imp_method, Amount_of_perturbation) %>%
    mutate(sil_sem = sd(Silhouette_score) / sqrt(length(Silhouette_score)), Silhouette_score = mean(Silhouette_score),
           mod_sem = sd(Modularity_score) / sqrt(length(Modularity_score)), Modularity_score = mean(Modularity_score),
           ari_sem = sd(Adjusted_Rand_Index) / sqrt(length(Adjusted_Rand_Index)), Adjusted_Rand_Index = mean(Adjusted_Rand_Index)) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    distinct(interaction(zero_imp_method, Amount_of_perturbation), .keep_all=TRUE)
  
  zim <- res_avg$zero_imp_method
  zim[grepl("multRepl|percentage", zim)] <- paste0(zim[grepl("multRepl|percentage", zim)], "%")
  res_avg$zero_imp_method <- zim
  
  p_list <- list()
  p_list[["p_sil"]] <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Silhouette_score, color = zero_imp_method)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Silhouette_score-sil_sem, ymax=Silhouette_score+sil_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Silhouette_score), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Silhouette_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differential cell types: ", nct, "\n(CLR-transformation)"))
  p_list[["p_mod"]] <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Modularity_score, color = zero_imp_method)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Modularity_score-mod_sem, ymax=Modularity_score+mod_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Modularity_score), 0.5)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differential cell types: ", nct, "\n(CLR-transformation)"))
  p_list[["p_clust"]] <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Adjusted_Rand_Index, color = zero_imp_method)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Adjusted_Rand_Index-ari_sem, ymax=Adjusted_Rand_Index+ari_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Adjusted_Rand_Index), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differential cell types: ", nct, "\n(CLR-transformation)"))
  p_list[["p_anosim"]] <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = ANOSIM_score, color = zero_imp_method)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=ANOSIM_score-ari_sem, ymax=ANOSIM_score+ari_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$ANOSIM_score), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Amount_of_perturbation, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differential cell types: ", nct, "\n(CLR-transformation)"))
  
  ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, paste0("zero_imputation_semisynthetic_unbalancedcounts", nct, "celltypesda.pdf")), plot = p_list[["p_clust"]], width = 4, height = 4)
  
  if (nct == 10) {
    ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, "zero_imputation_semisynthetic_unbalancedcounts.pdf"),
           plot = p_list[["p_clust"]] + ggtitle("10 random cell types\nUnbalanced counts:\nEach sample * rand[-10, 10]"),
           width = 5, height = 4)
  }
  
  p <- ggarrange(plotlist = p_list, nrow=1, common.legend = TRUE)
  print(p)
}

```



# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# Mean-variance across all datasets

```{r}
ctcomp_file <- "ctcomp_list.rds"

if (file.exists(ctcomp_file)) {
  ctcomp_list <- readRDS(ctcomp_file)
} else {
  ctcomp_list <- list()
}
```

```{r}
for (ds in names(datasets)) {
  if (is.null(ctcomp_list[[ds]])) {
    print(ds)
    seurat <- readRDS(file.path(path_data, paste0(datasets[[ds]][["ds_name"]], seurat_file_ending)))
    
    seurat@misc$label_col <- datasets[[ds]][["label_col"]]
    seurat@misc$low_res_ct_col <- datasets[[ds]][["low_res_ct_col"]]
    seurat@misc$hi_res_ct_col <- datasets[[ds]][["hi_res_ct_col"]]
    
    labels <- get_labels(seurat, seurat@misc$label_col)
    
    seurat <- subset(x = seurat, subset = !!sym(seurat@misc$label_col) == labels[1])
    
    ctcomp <- get_ct_comp_df_seurat(seurat, sample_col = "Sample", ct_col = seurat@misc$hi_res_ct_col)
    
    ctcomp_list[[ds]][["ctcomp"]] <- ctcomp
    ctcomp_list[[ds]][["group"]] <- labels[1]
  }
}
saveRDS(ctcomp_list, file = ctcomp_file)
```

```{r}
for (ds in names(datasets)) {
  print(ds)
  df_freq_unperturbed <- ctcomp_list[[ds]][["ctcomp"]] %>% impute_zeros(clr_zero_impute_method = "counts_all", clr_zero_impute_num = 1) %>% calc_perc_df()

  # plot(sort(Rfast::colVars(df_freq_unperturbed)))
  # plot(sort(log(Rfast::colVars(df_freq_unperturbed))))
  
  plot_data <- data.frame(
    mean = colMeans(df_freq_unperturbed),
    variance = Rfast::colVars(df_freq_unperturbed)
  )
  # Plot using ggplot2
  p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = mean, y = variance)) +
    geom_point() +
    labs(
      x = "Mean (in %)",
      y = "Variance (in %)"
    ) +
    theme_classic2() # Optional: a clean theme
  print(p)
  # ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, "semisynthetic_MeanVariance_percent.pdf"), width = 3, height = 2.5)
  # get_ct_var(df_freq_unperturbed, smooth_method = "gam")
  # ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, "semisynthetic_MeanVariance_percent_fit.pdf"), width = 3, height = 2.5)
  
  
  plot_data <- data.frame(
    mean = log(colMeans(df_freq_unperturbed)),
    variance = log(Rfast::colVars(df_freq_unperturbed))
  )
  # Plot using ggplot2
  p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = mean, y = variance)) +
    geom_point() +
    # geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dotted", color = "red") +
    labs(
      x = "log( Mean (in %) )",
      y = "log( Variance (in %) )"
    ) +
    theme_classic2() # Optional: a clean theme
  print(p)
  # ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, "semisynthetic_MeanVariance_percentLogLog.pdf"), width = 3, height = 2.5)
  
  
  means <- colMeans(clr(df_freq_unperturbed))
  vars <- Rfast::colVars(data.frame(clr(df_freq_unperturbed)))
  
  df1 <- data.frame(mean = means, variance = vars)
  
  max_cv_cts <- df1 %>%
    arrange(desc(variance))
  max_cv_cts <- row.names(max_cv_cts)
  
  p <- ggplot(df1, aes(x = mean, y = variance)) +
    geom_point() +
    xlab("Mean (in CLR)") +
    ylab("Variance (in CLR)") +
    theme_classic2()
  print(p)
  # ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, "semisynthetic_MeanVariance_CLR.pdf"), width = 3, height = 2.5)
  # get_ct_var(df_freq_unperturbed %>% clr())
  # ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, "semisynthetic_MeanVariance_CLR_fit.pdf"), width = 3, height = 2.5)
}
```

```{r}
# Create empty lists to store data from all datasets for each plot type
all_data_plot1 <- list()
all_data_plot2 <- list()
all_data_plot3 <- list()

for (ds in names(datasets)) {
  # Your existing data processing logic
  df_freq_unperturbed <- ctcomp_list[[ds]][["ctcomp"]] %>%
    impute_zeros(clr_zero_impute_method = "counts_all", clr_zero_impute_num = 1) %>%
    calc_perc_df()

  # --- Data for Plot 1 ---
  plot1_data <- data.frame(
    mean = colMeans(df_freq_unperturbed),
    variance = Rfast::colVars(df_freq_unperturbed),
    dataset = ds # Add a 'dataset' column
  )
  all_data_plot1[[ds]] <- plot1_data

  # --- Data for Plot 2 (Log-Log) ---
  plot2_data <- data.frame(
    mean = log(colMeans(df_freq_unperturbed)),
    variance = log(Rfast::colVars(df_freq_unperturbed)),
    dataset = ds
  )
  all_data_plot2[[ds]] <- plot2_data

  # --- Data for Plot 3 (CLR) ---
  means <- colMeans(clr(df_freq_unperturbed))
  vars <- Rfast::colVars(data.frame(clr(df_freq_unperturbed)))
  plot3_data <- data.frame(
    mean = means,
    variance = vars,
    dataset = ds
  )
  all_data_plot3[[ds]] <- plot3_data

  # (Continue with your individual plots within the loop if needed)
}
```

```{r}
# Combine all data frames for each plot type
final_data_plot1 <- bind_rows(all_data_plot1)
final_data_plot2 <- bind_rows(all_data_plot2)
final_data_plot3 <- bind_rows(all_data_plot3)

# Create the three overlay plots outside of the loop

## Overlay Plot 1: Mean-Variance (Percent)
p1_overlay <- ggplot(final_data_plot1, aes(x = mean, y = variance, color = dataset)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Mean-Variance: All Datasets (Percent)",
    x = "Mean (in %)",
    y = "Variance (in %)"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Dataset"))
print(p1_overlay)
ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, "semisynthetic_MeanVariance_allDatasets_percent.pdf"), width = 7, height = 3.5)


## Overlay Plot 2: Mean-Variance (Log-Log)
p2_overlay <- ggplot(final_data_plot2, aes(x = mean, y = variance, color = dataset)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Mean-Variance: All Datasets (Log-Log)",
    x = "log(Mean (in %))",
    y = "log(Variance (in %))"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Dataset"))
print(p2_overlay)
ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, "semisynthetic_MeanVariance_allDatasets_percentLogLog.pdf"), width = 7, height = 3.5)


## Overlay Plot 3: Mean-Variance (CLR)
p3_overlay <- ggplot(final_data_plot3, aes(x = mean, y = variance, color = dataset)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Mean-Variance: All Datasets (CLR)",
    x = "Mean (in CLR)",
    y = "Variance (in CLR)"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Dataset"))
print(p3_overlay)
ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, "semisynthetic_MeanVariance_allDatasets_CLR.pdf"), width = 7, height = 3.5)

```
